creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #2)
I'm using what was in the snapshot I unpacked into
my slices which includes src && ports.
graphics/gpu-firmware-intel-kmod FLAVOR=alderlake
gives me 20230625. iwlwifi came with boot/kernel
from the same snapshot. So I assume it's also
current. It's all from the 18th of this month, if
that helps any.

Thanks.

--Chris
